title: Term of office
doc_html:
§1362. Term of office

            The members of the board shall serve for six years and shall remain serving after their term expires until their successors are appointed by the governor.

            Acts 1990, No. 752, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1991; Acts 2025, No. 438, §1, eff. June 20, 2025.
doc_text:
§1362. Term of office
The members of the board shall serve for six years and shall remain serving after their
term expires until their successors are appointed by the governor.
Acts 1990, No. 752, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1991; Acts 2025, No. 438, §1, eff. June 20, 2025.
